goals.title: Finish the debt collection ontology implementation from .omo/plans/de...
goals.objective: Finish the debt collection ontology implementation from .omo/plans/debt-collection-ontology.md after interruption. Scope: finalize MCP domain server, gateway/IAM authorisation, repo-bound path safety, classifier/MCP refactors, final observable verification, reviewer approval, F1-F4 evidence, ledger/boulder closure, and an atomic commit. Required real-surface evidence includes MCP HTTP streamable smoke with IAM authorise-many scope decisions, focused legal ontology tests, integration MCP contract tests, evaluator CLI output, PII/path/token leak scan, final reviewer reports, and cleanup receipts.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP real-surface MCP smoke: start the MCP server against a fake TrustGraph gateway, validate token through gateway whoami, verify public websocket iam/authorise-many is not used, apply internal IAM scope-authorizer decisions, reject a bad token, allow reader-safe debt tools, and deny governance scope for a reader token.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-ontology/final-mcp-scope-smoke.txt containing MCP_SCOPE_HTTP_OK, internal_scope_authorizer_used=True, public_authorise_many_used=False, bad_token_rejected=True, reader_governance_rejected=True, and cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-ontology/final-mcp-scope-smoke.txt: MCP_SCOPE_HTTP_OK tools=47 debt_tool=True bad_token_rejected=True internal_scope_authorizer_used=True public_authorise_many_used=False reader_governance_rejected=True token_echo=False | cleanup: local MCP server/fake gateway killed by smoke script; temp venv/smoke dir removed; close_agent completed for all final reviewers

successCriteria.scenario: Adversarial boundary proof: repo-root-bounded path input rejects outside paths without reading or echoing server paths, tokens are never passed as tool arguments or echoed, source_refs remain redacted pointers, and PII/sensitive-pattern scans over changed code/docs/tests/evidence return no findings.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused MCP tests plus PII scan stdout; final reviewer report confirms no token/path/raw PII leak.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-ontology/final-verification-20260701.txt plus final reviewers: repo-root path rejection tests pass; authorization is not a tool argument; source_refs are pointer-normalized; sensitive scan no findings; final security/code reviewers ACCEPT | cleanup: no smoke temp dirs remain; final reviewers closed

successCriteria.scenario: Regression proof: run legal ontology unit suite, MCP integration tests, py_compile over changed Python files, evaluator CLI over legal OCR fixtures, and git diff whitespace checks.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: CLI stdout from pytest/py_compile/evaluate_packet/diff-check commands plus report artifacts.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-ontology/final-verification-20260701.txt: unit legal ontology 42 passed; MCP integration 3 passed; py_compile passed; evaluator CLI passed with tool_count=16 decision=보류; git diff checks passed | cleanup: no temp smoke dirs remain; no open reviewer agents

goals.evidence: C001 MCP HTTP smoke passed with internal scope authorizer and cleanup; C002 boundary/security proof passed with no token/path/PII leak and reviewer approval; C003 regression suite/evaluator/diff checks passed; final source commit 819e79da created.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/debt-collection-ontology-final-20260701/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/debt-collection-ontology-final-20260701/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001 MCP HTTP smoke passed with internal scope authorizer and cleanup; C002 boundary/security proof passed with no token/path/PII leak and reviewer approval; C003 regression suite/evaluator/diff checks passed; final source commit 819e79da created.
